subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who possesseth the kingdom of earth and heaven, Who through His most exalted Word hath drawn the hearts of the people of Bahá unto the Most Glorious Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد دارای ملک و ملکوت را که بکلمه علیا افئده اهل بها را بافق ابهی جذب نمود
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
